<svg viewBox="0 0 1360 3180" width="1360" height="3180" role="img" aria-labelledby="chart-title chart-desc">
<title id="chart-title">DASHSys end-to-end system dataflow flowchart</title>
<desc id="chart-desc">Input + Preflight | Routing + Query Understanding | Context + Planning | SQL Evidence Path | Adobe API Evidence Path | EvidenceBus | Answer Generation | Trajectory + Packaging | Evaluation + Reports | Diagnostic / Trial Side Paths | Mock Live API Readiness | Evidence-Aware Answer Rewrite | Runtime Config | Prompt Routing | QueryAnalysis | SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY | SQL Evidence | Adobe API Evidence | Adobe credentials present? | Live API | Dry-run fallback | API Response Parser | Discovery-chain readiness | Mock Live API Readiness | EvidenceBus | Answer Slots | Answer Synthesis | Claim Faithfulness | Final Answer | Trajectory Logging | Final Submission | Strict Eval | Hidden-style Eval | LLM Semantic Routing Helper | Evidence-Aware Answer Rewrite | not promoted | keep_trial_only | packaged runtime path | shadow diagnostic path | isolated trial path | User Prompt | Runtime Config | Validation Guard | Prompt Routing | Simple Prompt Gate | Query Normalization | Query Token Extraction | Deterministic QueryRouter | Answer Intent | QueryAnalysis | SchemaIndex / EndpointCatalog | Relevance Scoring | Context Packing | SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY main strategy | Evidence Policy | SQL / API Plan | SQL Template / Generic SQL | SQL validation passed? | SQLGlot AST | execute_sql DuckDB | SQL Result | Local SQL Evidence | API Plan | API validation passed? | Credential Headers | Adobe credentials present? | Live API mode warning | Dry-run fallback | API Response Parser | Evidence State success / empty / error | Adobe API Evidence | EvidenceBus | IDs / names / counts / statuses | SQL / live API / dry-run state | Answer Slots | Answer Synthesis | Claim Faithfulness | Final Answer | Trajectory Logging | trajectory.json / metadata.json / prompt | Final Submission | Evaluation + Reports | Strict Eval score: 0.6553 | Hidden-style Eval 48/48 | Check Submission ready: True | Report Index | Semantic router enabled? | SDK LLMClient | LLM Semantic Routing Helper | Hint Validation | shadow / not promoted | SDK LLM Baseline Diagnostic only | Synthetic Fixtures | Mock Parser success: 126 | Discovery-chain readiness | EvidenceBus Forwarding | Answer Slot Verification | Diagnostic only | Evidence-Aware Answer Synthesis | Claim Faithfulness | Answer-only Rewrite Trial | keep_trial_only not promoted</desc>
<defs>
<filter id="soft-shadow" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="125%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="1.2" stdDeviation="1.4" flood-color="#0f172a" flood-opacity=".12"/></filter>
<marker id="arrow-packaged" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#14532d"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-final" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#6d28d9"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-muted" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#94a3b8"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-trial" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#9ca3af"/></marker>
</defs>
<rect id="cluster_input" class="section-bg main-cluster" x="310" y="30" width="410" height="226" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="328" y="58">Input + Preflight</text>
<rect id="cluster_routing" class="section-bg main-cluster" x="300" y="288" width="430" height="462" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="318" y="316">Routing + Query Understanding</text>
<rect id="cluster_context" class="section-bg main-cluster" x="300" y="808" width="430" height="404" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="318" y="836">Context + Planning</text>
<rect id="cluster_sql" class="section-bg sql-cluster" x="92" y="1288" width="320" height="410" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="110" y="1316">SQL Evidence Path</text>
<rect id="cluster_api" class="section-bg api-cluster" x="548" y="1288" width="480" height="575" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="566" y="1316">Adobe API Evidence Path</text>
<rect id="cluster_evidence" class="section-bg evidence-cluster" x="325" y="1936" width="380" height="240" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="343" y="1964">EvidenceBus</text>
<rect id="cluster_answer" class="section-bg answer-cluster" x="325" y="2232" width="380" height="310" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="343" y="2260">Answer Generation</text>
<rect id="cluster_package" class="section-bg final-cluster" x="325" y="2628" width="380" height="232" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="343" y="2656">Trajectory + Packaging</text>
<rect id="cluster_eval" class="section-bg eval-cluster" x="60" y="2918" width="910" height="214" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="78" y="2946">Evaluation + Reports</text>
<rect id="cluster_diag" class="section-bg diag-cluster" x="760" y="300" width="260" height="396" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="778" y="328">Diagnostic / Trial Side Paths</text>
<rect id="cluster_mock" class="section-bg diag-cluster" x="1070" y="1288" width="260" height="362" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="1088" y="1316">Mock Live API Readiness</text>
<rect id="cluster_rewrite" class="section-bg diag-cluster" x="760" y="2232" width="260" height="276" rx="16"/>
<text class="section-label" x="778" y="2260">Evidence-Aware Answer Rewrite</text>
